name: Nicolai Bottle Table Lamp - 20 Inch Height - TBL3010 - White/Gold - Safavieh
description: Illuminate your space with the elegant and stylish Nicolai Table Lamp. This exquisite piece features a robust terrazzo base with charming specks of color that bring an artful aesthetic to any room. Supported by a lustrous gold metal body, the lamp exudes a subtle touch of sophistication and warmth. Topped with a classic fabric shade in a crisp white finish, the Nicolai Table Lamp casts a gentle and inviting glow, making it an ideal addition to your nightstand, end table, or office desk. Its unique combination of materials and its visually pleasing color scheme offer a perfect balance of functionality and decorative appeal. Embrace a touch of luxury and grace in your lighting collection with this beautifully crafted table lamp.
